title: Manufacturing Engineer - JSW Steel - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - JSW Steel - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, JSW Steel in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About JSW Steel:
JSW Steel is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JSW Steel!
